content.en:
Naturally, Halu didn't really see through Ye Tian's identity, just guessing.

But apart from being a clone of an ancient demon-level being, he couldn't think of any reason.

After all, a king-level who is not afraid of himself, and can also resist the attack of a wisp of his own power, his physical body is very inconsistent with the realm, which can only be explained by the clone of the ancient demon-level existence.

Now.

Ye Tian was a little surprised, because Haru guessed his identity, but if he thought about it carefully, it was not strange to guess it, after all, his combat power was too strange.

And the patriarch Heying and the emperor-level existence He Lao can't see it, because he has been living in the Eagle Department, growing up from weakness, there are traces to follow, and he has also entered the ancient demon-level ruins that can only be entered below the emperor level.

So, they didn't have any doubts.

But it was the first time Haru had seen him, so it was natural that he would have such suspicions.

Ye Tian didn't refute, didn't answer, didn't say anything, but ~ the best choice.

He was silent for a moment, then said, "I'm curious why Your Excellency is sealed here-?"

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't answer, Halu didn't ask more, just said lightly: "It's very simple, I just offended the Golden God Ministry, can you let me out?"

"Wouldn't I offend the Golden God Department if I let you go?"

Ye Tian said.

Haru said, "If you let me go, I am willing to give you enough benefits." "

"What's the benefit of talking about it specifically?" Ye Tian asked.

Haru was silent for a moment before he said slowly: "If you rescue me, I can give you a piece of the Ultimate Gujian, the value of the Ultimate Gujian, you should know very well that any Gudemon-level existence wants to get it." The Golden God Ministry didn't know that I had this treasure, and of course even if they did, they wouldn't release me. "

Ye Tian didn't know what the Ultimate Gujian was, but he couldn't ask at the moment, otherwise he would be exposed.

Therefore, he pretended to know, and then said: "How do I know if you have the ultimate ancient jian, and how do you know if you will hand over the ultimate ancient jian fragment to me?

"So what do you say?"

Haru asked.

Ye Tian thought for a while and said, "That's it, you give me the Ultimate Gujian first, and I make an oath to save you, how about it?"

"No way, I don't believe in any oath!" Haru refused.

Ye Tian also knew that it was impossible for Haru to agree to such a deal, unless Halu was a fool.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Haru kept discussing.

Ye Tian wanted to get some benefits from Haru, and Halu wanted Ye Tian to rescue him, and both of them were playing tricks.

In the end, Haru proposed, "In this way, I can pass on a part of the breath of the Ultimate Gujian, even if it is the breath of the Ultimate Gujian, it has a certain value." "

"Not enough!" Ye Tian shook his head, "Do you have any treasures on you that can be deduced and analyzed?"

"I do have the treasures of deduction and analysis, but almost all of them are treasures with side effects, no side effects, the grade is too low, and it is useless to you and me. Haroo.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "Even if it's a side effect, I want it." "

Seeing this, Haru said: "I have an Ultimate Ancient Treasure on my body, a treasure of this level of the Ultimate Ancient Treasure is already of great value, but that Ultimate Ancient Treasure is the Demon Ancient Mirror, and the creatures under the Ancient Demon Level urge it, which will consume its own potential, causing the body to have unimaginable sequelae, and there is no hope of becoming an Ancient Demon Realm." And if the Ancient Demon Realm urges it, it will also cause itself to have serious consequences, and if it is urged for a long time, the ultimate origin will collapse. "

"The breath of the Ultimate Ancient Classic, plus this Ultimate Ancient Classic, and then we all make an oath, how about it?" Ye Tian said.

Haru agreed, whether it was the breath of the Ultimate Ancient Treasure or the Demon Ancient Mirror, even if it was lost, the loss would not be big.

Moreover, in this area, the hope of encountering other Ancient Demon level existences is extremely low, not to mention that it has to be an Ancient Demon level who is willing to offend the Golden God Ministry, so there are even fewer of them.

Therefore, he could only hope that Ye Tian could be rescued.

Soon, they began to make vows.

Soon, the vow was made.

Haru tried his best to send out the aura of the Ultimate Ancient Treasure and a mirror through the layers of sealing enchantments.

And after doing this, Haru also became very weak.

"Now, you can let me go, right?"

Haru said.

Ye Tiandao: "Not yet!"

Haru said angrily, "Are you going to break your oath?"

Ye Tian shook his head, "It's not that I broke my oath, it's that my body is not here, otherwise, it wouldn't be my temporary clone who came to see you." Don't worry, I made a vow that I would rush over to save you when my body took care of the matter. "

Seeing Ye Tian say this, Haru also knew that he was tricked by Ye Tian, although Ye Tian did not say that he would not save him, but there was no specific time, so let him wait until when.

Haru regretted it.

But he also wanted to come out too much, so he didn't think much about it, and now he realized that he was really stupid!

"Haru, don't worry, I'll get you out, but not now, I'll come to visit you occasionally!"

Ye Tian left with the aura of the Ultimate Ancient Mirror and the Demon Ancient Mirror.

......

Dongmu River.

After Ye Tian came back, he looked at the Ultimate Ancient Treasure Aura and the Demon Ancient Mirror in his hand, and smiled.

This trip to the Void Demon Valley is really too rewarding!

For example, this magic ancient mirror, it is impossible for the Eagle Department to take out such an ultimate ancient treasure, and for him, this ultimate ancient treasure is too valuable, so he can use it perfectly.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to refine the Demon Ancient Mirror.

After spending a period of time, the Demon Ancient Mirror has been completely refined and recognized as the Lord.

Immediately afterward, he began to comprehend the breath of the Ultimate Ancient Scripture.

He was curious about what the specific value of the Ultimate Ancient Treasure was, and why Haru paid so much attention to it.

Airplanes!!!!

Enlightenment begins!

As soon as he comprehended the Ultimate Ancient Scripture, Ye Tian was shocked. 、

In his perception, the aura of the Ultimate Gu Jian seemed to allow him to witness the most perfect Ultimate World, and all the Ultimate Particles were combined in the most perfect image, and he could completely deduce the Ultimate Rule Realm here.

"This Ultimate Gujian can help comprehend and cultivate the Ultimate Rule Realm, and the value is much higher than that black stone, this is the true display of the Ultimate Rule Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately afterward, he began to use the Magic Ancient Mirror to assist in deduction, so that he could comprehend more things from the breath of the Ultimate Ancient Scripture.

It's a pity that there is too little aura of the Ultimate Gujian, and it won't take long to comprehend it.

So, time can't be wasted.
